creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port devel/qtcreator fails to build for poudriere once again on my system which is 12.1-stable amd64.  I had created a bug for a similar issue previously and it was fixed but a similar problem seems to have returned.

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for qtcreator-4.9.2_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/qtcreator/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/qtcreator/qtcreator-dev/core-fileiconprovider-sub-qt-creator.html:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/qtcreator
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for qtcreator-4.9.2_1
build of devel/qtcreator | qtcreator-4.9.2_1 ended at Thu Oct 10 20:27:24 EDT 2019
build time: 00:10:18
!!! build failure encountered !!!
